summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOGITAG Reservation Module (Phase 1-4). All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested and working: Planning page with calendar views, My Reservations with check-out/check-in actions, KPI Dashboard with notifications center.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reservations returns list (20 reservations)
Backend: GET /api/reservations?status=confirmed filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/reservations/planning returns planning data
Backend: GET /api/reservations/kpis returns all KPI fields
Backend: POST /api/reservations creates new reservation
Backend: POST /api/reservations with missing fields returns 422
Backend: Anti-conflict returns 409 for overlapping dates
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/checkout changes status to in_progress
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/checkin changes status to completed
Backend: Checkout on non-confirmed returns 400
Backend: Checkin on non-in_progress returns 400
Backend: POST /api/reservations/{id}/cancel changes status to cancelled
Backend: Cancel on completed returns 400
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns list
Backend: GET /api/notifications?unread_only=true filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/notifications/count returns unread count
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all marks all as read
Backend: GET /api/reservations/{id} returns detail with logs
Backend: GET /api/reservations/{id} with invalid ID returns 404
Backend: GET /api/reservations/availability/{asset_id} returns availability
Frontend: Login flow works (admin/user@1234)
Frontend: Planning page (/reservation/planning) loads with calendar
Frontend: Planning title 'Réservation & Planning' displayed
Frontend: Planning grid shows events with color-coded status
Frontend: View toggles (Jour/Semaine/Mois) work correctly
Frontend: Status filter dropdown works
Frontend: Site filter dropdown works
Frontend: Search input filters reservations
Frontend: 'Nouvelle réservation' button opens create modal
Frontend: Create modal has all fields (Asset, User, Team, Project, Site, Dates, Priority, Note)
Frontend: Clicking event opens detail drawer
Frontend: Detail drawer shows reservation info with Check-out/Check-in sections
Frontend: My Reservations page (/reservation/myreservations) loads
Frontend: Tabs (Actives/Historique) switch correctly
Frontend: Reservation cards display with status badges
Frontend: Checkout button opens checkout modal
Frontend: Checkout modal has fields (Responsable, Lieu, État, Commentaire)
Frontend: Checkin button opens checkin modal
Frontend: Checkin modal has fields (Responsable, État retour, Commentaire)
Frontend: KPI Dashboard (/reservation/dashboard) loads
Frontend: 6 KPI cards displayed (Total, En cours, Confirmées, Aujourd'hui, En retard, Terminées)
Frontend: Centre d'alertes shows notifications
Frontend: 'Tout marquer lu' button works
Frontend: Top assets réservés panel shows top 5 assets
Frontend: Réservations récentes panel shows recent items
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumReservationPlanning.jsx: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes, calendar views, and modal handling
PremiumMyReservations.jsx: Clean card-based UI with checkout/checkin modals and tab navigation
PremiumReservationDashboard.jsx: KPI grid, notifications panel, and recent reservations all properly implemented
server.py: Reservation CRUD, anti-conflict logic, check-out/check-in workflow, and notifications all working correctly
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all API responses
seed_data_creation: Seed data already populated via POST /api/reservations/seed (20 reservations, 4 notifications)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reservation module fully tested. Key data-testids: reservation-planning, planning-title, create-reservation-btn, planning-grid, view-day/week/month, filter-status, filter-site, create-modal, detail-drawer, my-reservations, myres-title, tab-active, tab-past, res-card-{i}, checkout-btn-{i}, checkin-btn-{i}, co-modal, ci-modal, reservation-dashboard, rdb-title, kpi-grid, kpi-{i}, notifications-panel, mark-all-read, top-assets-panel, recent-panel. External API is slow (10-20 sec). WebSocket errors are from external API, not affecting core functionality.

phase1_backend.anti_conflict: Returns 409 for overlapping reservations on same asset

features: 6 KPI cards (Total, En cours, Confirmées, Aujourd'hui, En retard, Terminées)
